_doc: Phase 5.6 M-E S2/S3 allowlist. Each entry is a CLAUDE.md claim that today lacks on-disk evidence and is cross-referenced to a row in the M-A conformance audit (docs/audits/2026-04-17-conformance-audit.md). Entries are removed by the M-C/M-D restoration commits as evidence lands. The list shrinks as Phase 5.6 progresses; M-G ships with strict mode (zero allowlisted entries). Adding a new entry mid-flight requires a paired audit-doc row + disposition + scope-expansion mini-gate (plan §14.3).
_lifecycle: M-E ship: full allowlist as documented in audit §20. M-C restoration: backend rows deleted from this file. M-D restoration: UI rows deleted. M-G ship: file deleted (CI defaults to strict mode + workflow runs --strict). Updates require an atomic commit referencing the audit row that justifies the change.
